owner_intent: Freeze the approved source vocabulary for decision entry and continuation flows so analytics source labels stop growing as raw string literals.
rules: Fresh decision profile entry links must use the fresh_profile_entry_sources vocabulary through shared helpers.
Continuation links from me/history/bag may use continuation_sources but may not invent new raw strings without owner freeze.
If a surface cannot determine a specific source, it may preserve an existing propagated source; it may not create a new fallback label ad hoc.
Source vocabulary freeze applies to query param `source` and any analytics props derived from it for decision entry/continuation flows.
review_gates: No component or page may hardcode a new decision-entry or continuation source string outside shared helper ownership.
Any new source label must first land in this file and then in the shared helper constants.
